info.title: Kalfa API Documentation
info.description:
## Kalfa RSVP + Seating API

Multi-tenant REST API for managing events, guests, seating assignments, invitations, and RSVP responses.

### Authentication
All endpoints (except public RSVP) require a **Bearer token** issued via Laravel Sanctum.
Include it in every request header:
```
Authorization: Bearer {your-token}
```

### Multi-Tenancy
All tenant resources are scoped under `/api/organizations/{organization}`.
The `{organization}` segment must be an organization you are a member of.

### Rate Limiting
| Endpoint group | Limit |
|---|---|
| Public RSVP (GET) | 60 req/min |
| Public RSVP (POST) | 10 req/min |
| Payment webhooks | 120 req/min |

post.description:
**Token flow** (PaymentsJS): provide `token` → returns `{ status: "processing", payment_id }`.
**Redirect flow**: omit `token` → returns `{ redirect_url }` to send the user to the payment page.

⚠️ PCI: Never send raw card data. Only single-use tokens from PaymentsJS are accepted.
post.summary: Initiate one-time payment for an event

get.description:
Supports optional `?status` query filter (e.g. `Draft`, `Active`, `PendingPayment`, `Cancelled`, `Completed`).
Returns a paginated result.

post.description: Event is created in `Draft` status. Payment must be initiated to activate it.

get.summary: Get a single event with guests, tables, invitations, and billing details
List all seating tables for an event, ordered by sort_order

post.summary: Create a new seating table/area for an event

put.summary: Update a seating table's name, capacity, or sort order

patch.summary: Update a seating table's name, capacity, or sort order

post.description:
Accepts webhook notifications from supported gateways (e.g. `sumit`).
Validates HMAC signature if `BILLING_WEBHOOK_SECRET` is configured.
Idempotent: duplicate notifications for already-processed payments are safely ignored.

get.summary: List all guests for an event, ordered by sort_order

post.summary: Add a guest to an event

put.summary: Update a guest. All fields are optional (PATCH semantics)

patch.summary: Update a guest. All fields are optional (PATCH semantics)

delete.summary: Remove a guest from an event

post.description:
The CSV must have a header row. Supported columns: `name`, `email`, `phone`, `notes`.
Hebrew column names are also supported: `שם` for name.
Rows with no name and no email are silently skipped.

Returns count of imported and skipped rows.
post.summary: Import guests from a CSV file

get.summary: List all invitations for an event with guest details

post.description: Optionally link to a guest via `guest_id`. Generates a unique RSVP slug automatically.
post.summary: Create a new invitation for an event

post.description: Pass `send_whatsapp: true` to send the RSVP link via WhatsApp to the guest's phone number.
post.summary: Send an invitation via WhatsApp (optional) and mark it as sent

patch.summary: Update organization details. Requires Owner or Admin role

get.summary: Return only status enum. Auth + org scope enforced via Policy

get.description:
Returns public-safe event and guest information for an invitation link.
Event must be in Active status.

post.description:
Idempotent per invitation: calling again with a different response will update the existing one.
Only available for events in Active status.

get.summary: List all seat assignments for an event, with guest and table details

put.description:
Replaces or creates assignments for the given guests. Existing assignments not in the list are preserved.
Returns the full updated list.
put.summary: Bulk upsert seat assignments for an event

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
